SessionStart.description: Load OpenMetadata workflow skill at session start

hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q -- '--no-verify'; then echo '{"decision": "block", "reason": "Do not skip pre-commit hooks. Fix the underlying issue instead."}'; exit 2; fi

FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.java$'; then echo 'Reminder: run `mvn spotless:apply` before committing Java changes.'; fi

PostToolUse.description: Remind to format Java after edits

hooks.command: FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -qE 'openmetadata-spec/src/main/resources/json/schema/.*\.json$'; then echo 'Schema file modified. Run `make generate` to regenerate models.'; fi

PostToolUse.description: Remind to regenerate after schema changes
